content.full_text:
February 14, 2003

Margarette Morgan
J. Wayne Dernetz
2056 Camino Cantera
Vista, CA 92084

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-345

Dear Ms. Morgan:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice relating to the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ On January 14, 2003, I informed you that your request did not contain a specific question to which we could respond, and asked that you amend your request and resubmit (a copy of my letter is attached). As we have not received a response, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

If you still wish to obtain written advice, please resubmit your inquiry in the form of a question. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for guidance on advice letter submission, however, please contact me at (916) 322-5660 should you need additional clarification.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Natalie P. Bocanegra
Counsel, Legal Division

NPB:jg
I:\Advice Ltrs\02159

¹ Government Code sections 81000-9114. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997 of the California Code of Regulations.
